title: Production Multi-Agent AI on AWS — Bedrock AgentCore

# Production Multi-Agent AI on AWS — Bedrock AgentCore

[GenAI Fund - Official](https://luma.com/gaf?k=c)

Jul

9

Thursday, July 9

1:00 PM - 2:30 PM GMT+7

Register to See Address

Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

Welcome! Please choose your desired ticket type:

Request to Join

You will be asked to verify token ownership with your wallet.

About Event

One smart agent feels like a breakthrough.

Then someone asks if it can run in production — with persistent memory, coordinated agents, and no model lock-in — and the architecture starts to show its cracks.

Multi-agent AI is where serious systems live. But orchestrating those agents — with shared memory, tool access, and governance that holds — is where most engineering teams stall.

Bedrock AgentCore is where you move past the stall.

* * *

 **What This Is**

A 90-minute hands-on workshop at the [AWS HCMC Office](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61) — built for engineers actively building at Agentic AI Build Week.

In 90 minutes, you will:

- Deploy a multi-agent system on AgentCore Runtime — using LangGraph, CrewAI, or your own framework — on fully managed AWS infrastructure, with no self-hosted overhead

- Implement episodic and semantic memory so your agents learn from past interactions and maintain context across tasks

- Apply supervisor and collaborative orchestration patterns — and understand exactly when each is the right call

- Configure the AgentCore Gateway for intelligent routing, model versioning, and traffic management across your agent fleet

- Leave with a working multi-agent system with memory, tool use, and Code Interpreter built from scratch — not a walkthrough, a build

* * *

 **Who This Is For**

This workshop is for you if:

- You're a developer, solutions architect, or technical founder who has shipped a single agent and wants to understand what production orchestration actually looks like

- You're building something at AABW that needs to handle complex, multi-step tasks across more than one agent

- You've used frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI and want to understand how enterprise infrastructure wraps around them

This is NOT for you if you want a whiteboard overview of multi-agent theory. You'll build a system here — not a slide deck.

* * *

 **Your Speaker**

 **Thi Nguyen** is a Senior Solutions Architect at Amazon Web Services. She works with engineering teams across the region on deploying production-grade AI systems on AWS — from initial architecture through to scaling and governance.

* * *

 **The Context**

This session is part of [Agentic AI Build Week (Jul 8–12)](https://luma.com/gaf-hm61) — Southeast Asia's largest agentic AI hackathon, hosted at the AWS HCMC Office with 2,000+ builders, 30+ tech partners, and a $1M+ prize pool.

 **Main event registration required.** [Register for AABW](https://bit.ly/AABWSKP?utm_source=luma) first, then apply for this workshop.

* * *

Seats are limited to the AWS office capacity. Every applicant is reviewed — engineers actively building at AABW get priority.

👉 Apply below if you're building a real system, not just watching one.

Location

Please register to see the exact location of this event.

Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

[View on Google Maps](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=10.772274851415126%2C106.70650461546764)
